summary: Duplicate of ISS-1130 cluster — already covered by EXP-395 (authored by previous analyst run 2026-05-16T06:57:16Z, status=complete in tracker as of baby-orphan-ISS-1130 entry with closes_iss_cluster=[ISS-1130, ISS-1147, ISS-1164]). EXP-395 re-evaluates the EXP-183 author_* schema extension proposal (ISS-1130, ISS-1164) and the rendering decision (ISS-1164) in light of 30-day static state of the dome machine-layer. No new analysis required for ISS-1164; close as already-fixed-by-source. Bookkeeping cleanup — the previous analyst marked baby-orphan-ISS-1130 tracker entry complete but did not write close-no-patch proposals for the cluster duplicates, so the assigned-analyst ISSs sat orphaned. This proposal closes that gap.
